toolType: High-efficiency industrial tool for Reverse Engineering

features.name: ReverseEngineeringTool
features.description: A high-efficiency industrial tool for reverse engineering complex systems.

modules.name: ReverseEngineeringModule
modules.description: Handles the core functionality for reverse engineering.

functions.name: analyzeSystem
functions.description: Analyzes a given system to extract its components and structure.

parameters.name: systemData
parameters.description: A dictionary containing the data of the system to be analyzed.

returns.description: A dictionary containing the extracted components and structure of the system.

functions.name: logAnalysis
functions.description: Logs the analysis results for debugging and auditing purposes.

parameters.name: analysisResults
parameters.description: A dictionary containing the analysis results to be logged.
